system.descriptor: Logic reflects a character's ability to reason, analyse problems, solve puzzles, and apply deductive thinking.
system.uses:
Uses: Solving puzzles, analysing data, deductive reasoning, gambling, deciphering codes, processing complex information.
Special Use: Ciphers: Logic can be used to create or break simple ciphers and codes. More complex encryption requires Forbidden Lore or Scholastic Lore.
Special Use: Gambling: Opposed Logic tests determine the winner in games of strategy and chance.

description.value: Logic reflects a character's ability to reason, analyse problems, solve puzzles, and apply deductive thinking.
